programme.desc: Doug and Carrie donate $500 to the school library and get their names put on a plaque.

programme.desc: When Doug needs dental work, he discovers that Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Arthur, Spooner
programme.desc: Carrie is assigned team leader and discovers that being the boss isn't what she expected.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Window Pain
programme.desc: Carrie drives Doug crazy when she becomes obsessed with impressing the new neighbours.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Holy Mackerel
programme.desc: When Carrie prays for a raise and gets one, she and Doug start praying for more things.

programme.title: Movie: Just Go With It
programme.desc: To cover up a lie he told his girlfriend, a plastic surgeon convinces his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death by the Bayou
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a disabled teenager is sentenced to death, but the discovery of hidden eyewitness interviews casts new light on his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.desc: The intense winter has frozen the water supply on the homestead, forcing Marty to hunt for a new water source. In Hawaii, Matt and his wife Katie self-film a lesson in Cacao harvesting on her family's plantation.

programme.desc: The Raneys find a cure for toxic land that's plaguing a Kentucky homestead and convince a Virginia family that their free-range dream is killing their farm. The Raneys also take on an ambitious off-grid power supply project for a Tennessee family.

programme.desc: Contestants from all walks of life compete for glory and $25,000 cash in an arena unlike any other. A dodgeball deity tests his mettle. A fitness model shows she can do more than just look the part. 'Aaron Rodgers' tries his hand at a brand-new ballgame.

programme.title: Dodgeball Thunderdome: The Hits Keep Coming
programme.desc: A dockhand hopes his sea legs will keep him steady. A deputy sheriff lays down the law.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Vellum Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to Yakima, Washington to harvest hops, the main ingredient in beer. From there Mike goes to the Hudson Valley where he turns animal hides in to paper.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Steel Mill Worker
programme.desc: Mike works with a river barge demolition team then melts down the scrap steel into molten metal.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leech Trapper
programme.desc: Mike teams up with the boys from Bartos Bait & Fish to catch leeches that will later be sold for fish bait; then it's off to the Green Tripe factory in Hollister, CA where Mike helps make BARF (Biologically Appropriate Raw Food) for dogs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Spider Pharm
programme.desc: Mike ventures to Payette, Idaho to learn how to make high quality bird food. Then he heads s to Yarnell, Arizona to collect spiders from the desert to milk them for their venom.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Hair Fairy
programme.desc: Mike climbs Jelm Mountain to help change out an old wooden power pole with a metal one.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fossil Hunter
programme.desc: Mike travels to a remote area near Moab, Utah, to take on the job of being a paleontologist.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: The Dope of Oregon
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Jim Belushi is adding another expertise to his repertoire: cannabis farmer! Jim learns the hard way that the 'I'll do it myself' mentality leads to mistakes. Later, Jim discovers that his family's support for his new endeavor is waning.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: A Mission from God
programme.desc: Jim and Chris are on their way to Idaho for a Blues Brothers show with Dan Aykroyd, where Jim plans to ask Dan for the right to use the Blues Brothers' brand. Dan sets Jim on a 'Mission from God' to Colombia, in pursuit of elusive cannabis strains.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: Nose No Bounds
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: An American Tail
programme.desc: Taylor has a large bump at the base of her spine that is far more dangerous than she realizes. John jokes about hip lump but turns out it's no laughing matter. Noelle had her ears stretched as a teenager, but now wants them repaired.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Where Are They Now: Taylore
programme.desc: Check back in with aspiring model Taylore to see whether her keloid elf ears have grown back.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: It's a Boy!
programme.desc: Emma is diagnosed with a speech disorder which she must overcome in order to lead summer camp activities. Worried about her ability to lead a group, Trent and Amber take the family to an improv class to help Emma think on her feet.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Coco Is Not Impressed
programme.desc: Mariah is looking for a princess dress and wants dog Coco to match. Jami is eloping to Paris and needs a dress as magical as her destination. After losing everything in an apartment fire, Brittany and Justin reach out to George to help save their wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Seven People With Seven Opinions
programme.desc: Super fan TK brings seven of her closest friends to help her choose her dress. Actress Leslie has an unlimited budget, but she refuses to believe her opinionated mom chose the perfect wedding gown on the very first try.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Fashionably Late
programme.desc: While Randy's in Barcelona showing his second collection, Chelsea's princess dream dress goes missing from the store and crazy rich Asian bride Cheryl finds fault with every gown she sees.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Crazy Uncle Randy
programme.desc: Tracey's determined to find a black gown but mom says no and insists on calling in Tracey's fiancé to back her up in the fight for white! Randy's niece Danielle is getting married and the pressure is on her 'crazy uncle' to find her the perfect dress.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: 14 and Looking for Mr. Right
programme.desc: Priscilla, a 14-year-old Gypsy girl, is a fully trained Gypsy wife who is looking for a husband.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Gypsy Annie marries her first cousin in an outrageous fox fur wedding dress. Ana follows her heart but breaks the rules in the first gay gypsy wedding.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Nukkie and Pookie (Finally) Say I Do
programme.desc: Two gypsy sweethearts finally plan their long awaited wedding despite their mothers' disapproval. However, the grudge has spread to other family members, and the couple wonders if it will ever be put to rest. Plus, an ex-con gypsy tries to move forward.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: After the Rain Comes the Rainbow
programme.desc: Gypsy Samantha can't wait to marry her gorger fiancée Bridgette, but Samantha's sister may just ruin the big day. Lexi's chances of meeting a future husband at her Sweet 16 party might be halted by her protective older brother.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gorger Parents Fight Back
programme.desc: As Traci and David prepare for a big Gypsy wedding, Traci's disapproving gorger mother threatens to wreak havoc on their special day. Gypsy Lee Ann and her gorger husband Joe butt heads when she plans to throw their young daughter Mary a coming-out party.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain Conflict
programme.desc: Sig races to offload his tanks before losing half a million dollars in crab. The Bering Sea doubles down on punishment for one Cornelia Marie greenhorn. Tension between co-captains reaches a breaking point in the Wizard's wheelhouse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Baptism by Fire
programme.desc: It's baptism by fire aboard the Northwestern as Mandy takes her first shift in heavy seas. The Wizard crew battles over one crewman who isn't pulling his weight on deck. Caught short on bait gear and battered by high seas, Wild Bill changes his strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Supermoon Storm
programme.desc: A 150 year supermoon storm wreaks havoc on tides, churning undersea currents that rip pots right off their lines. The Coast Guard attempts a rescue mission in the heart of the storm, while Wild Bill faces his worst nightmare as a greenhorn goes overboard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Greenhorn Overboard
programme.desc: The Summer Bay crew scrambles to steal one of their own from the Bering Sea's icy grip. Saga and Cornelia Marie battle colossal waves in the supermoon storm.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Turf Wars
programme.desc: Sig pushes Mandy to invade the Cornelia Marie's ground, sparking a battle for the crab. As the Cornelia Marie's pots get tangled with the Northwestern's, Casey takes extreme measures to defend his turf. A Saga distress signal sends panic across the fleet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: A severe arctic gale batters the fleet, forcing captains to fight extreme wind and waves. For the second time, a greenhorn's life hangs in the balance on the Summer Bay. The Saga crew seeks shelter at St. Paul, where tidal forces snap Jake's anchor.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood and Water
programme.desc: As rogue waves threaten to capsize their boats, Jake and Sean must make life or death decisions for their crews on deck. Wild Bill faces a choice that could end his career, and Keith returns to the Wizard put an unexpected end to his brother's rule.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Storm Surge
programme.desc: The captains take on the steepest waves yet in an epic final surge to hit their quotas. Jake fights through a debilitating crew injury on deck. Josh gambles big on his crab count, while engine failure leaves Sig dead in the water.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The deck is plagued with accidents, and winter season rocks the fleet with swells of 20 feet and winds of 40 knots. The Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on Cornelia Marie, and strategy is critical with crabs on the move in the wheelhouse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain Conflict
programme.desc: Sig races to offload his tanks before losing half a million dollars in crab. The Bering Sea doubles down on punishment for one Cornelia Marie greenhorn. Tension between co-captains reaches a breaking point in the Wizard's wheelhouse.

programme.desc: In this adventure, Steve learns how to trap an 11-foot tiger shark in a plastic bag.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Danube
programme.desc: The Danube's scenic route through ten European countries has made it a tourist magnet. Poachers, invasive species and engineering projects have made it one of the most endangered rivers on Earth. Jeremy investigates what can be done to save it.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Zambezi
programme.desc: Wild and unnavigable, Africa's Zambezi boasts the world's mightiest waterfall, heart-pounding rapids and man-eating crocs. From the upper reaches in Zambia to the delta in Mozambique, Jeremy investigates the threats to this mighty river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Ganges
programme.desc: India's mighty Ganges, a river revered by a billion Hindus as a living goddess, is in trouble. Jeremy Wade is on a 1,500-mile mission to investigate the problems first hand and discover what is being done to save this holy river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Amazon
programme.desc: The Amazon is the mightiest of all the rivers, but it is also under immense pressure. Jeremy Wade traces the epic migration of the dorado catfish and discovers the issues putting this great river at risk from leaking pipelines to impassable dams.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Yangtze
programme.desc: China's Yangtze River is threatened by overfishing, industrial pollution and the loss of iconic monster fish. Jeremy journeys upstream to find out if there are any fish left, and meets the heroes fighting for the future of the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Mississippi
programme.desc: The mighty Mississippi is threatened on several fronts: from alien invaders pushing out iconic native fish, to vast blooms of green algae strangling life from the river. Jeremy meets scientists, fishermen and leaders fighting to save the river.

programme.desc: Gage lands a photo shoot for Jeff with furniture company Alder & Tweed. While the JLD crew scrambles to get everything in place, Jeff's focus is on Valley Vista.

programme.title: Flipping Out: A Very Lewis Christmas
programme.desc: The JLD team heads to New York. It's Monroe's first trip, leaving Jeff and Gage more than a little nervous. Jeff charters a private plane and brings along her nanny and grandparents. Once they arrive, they search for real estate for Jeff's client.

programme.title: Flipping Out: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Jeff's project managers clash, only adding to the chaos he was hoping to alleviate. Meanwhile, neighbour Lea Black is back in town and ready to get to work on renovating her kitchen. Later, Jeff runs into trouble with another neighbour.

programme.title: Flipping Out: Edward vs. Lewis
programme.desc: Jeff and Gage are at it again. Not only are they competing over who does what around the house, but whose flip is moving along fastest. Meanwhile, new troubles pop up at Valley Vista and Old Hollywood.

programme.title: Flipping Out: The Straw(berry) That Broke the Camel's Back
programme.desc: Jeff's grandma is rushed to the hospital and his stress level is through the roof. While planning for the worst, Jeff takes on Grandma's healthcare to make sure she receives the best treatment.

programme.title: Flipping Out: Diamonds Aren't Forever
programme.desc: Jeff's business partner, Julie, is asking the hard questions and her overly-involved approach to the flipping process clashes with Jeff's working style. Later, the group sets out to furnish Heather's completed home and Frankie is demoted.

programme.title: Flipping Out: Trimming the Fat
programme.desc: Attempting to start fresh after closing a chapter in his life, Jeff turns to friend Teddi Mellencamp's accountability program. JLD finds out clients Liat and Trevor are headed for divorce, which means the team is left in the middle.

programme.title: Flipping Out: Destructive Criticism
programme.desc: Jeff meets with new client Randall, but is more concerned with pleasing Lala Kent, who will be making most of the design decisions. Lea Black finally starts her kitchen demolition. A realization by Jeff pushes long-time employee Megan to make tough call.

programme.title: Flipping Out: The Final Flip
programme.desc: Lea Black leads a productivity seminar at Jeff Lewis Design, which brings a lot of issues to the surface and sparks a mass exodus. Jeff and Jenni have it out in what may be the biggest fight of their friendship.

programme.desc: It was a plot straight out of an Alfred Hitchcock film. A woman peers into a neighbor’s yard and catches a glimpse of something unsettling. What she saw and what she did set a chain of events in motion that would divide a family and a jury.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Player

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Great Escape

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Lockhart Road

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Punked?
programme.desc: We count down the most unbelievable internet clips, but we may have been punked. From revolutionary reversing, fish out of water and a bizarre six pack, our experts separate the facts from the fake.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Shock and Awesome
programme.desc: Prepare to be shocked as we count down the most surprising and unexpected clips on the internet. There's a communicating crow, a super speedy tractor, a silly putty axe, a monster crane lift, and a surfing motorcycle.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Facepalm
programme.desc: We're turning epic fails into epic wins. In our search for the most cringe-worthy clips on the internet, we witness a close call with a humpback whale, a plane that flies with circular wings, painful ant bites, and a glow stick explosion.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Brain vs. Brawn
programme.desc: In this episode mind and body go head to head as we pit brain vs brawn. We're smashing fruit with a nine-inch nail launcher, building and destroying a giant sandcastle, and kissing cobras.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Garage Genius
programme.desc: We're searching the world's garages, backyards and basements to find the hottest home inventors on the web. From a super strong model truck, a human powered carnival ride to a backyard apocalypse proof bunker, we shine a light on home-grown genius.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Is This for Real?
programme.desc: We separate science fact from science fiction in this episode. From a woman who walks on water and a man that pumps up inner tubes with his ears, our experts ask if they are real and expose the internet's best tricksters.

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Muthas of Invention
programme.desc: Features the tallest bicycle in L.A., the Polish hover platform, the human powered car, the Saharan solar powered 3D printer and the British pulse-jet powered bicycle.

programme.desc: Penny Knell is admitted to a special care facility, where a devious mastermind is waiting to prey upon society's most vulnerable. When Penny's family gets caught in her web, the consequences will be fatal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death on the Hudson
programme.desc: When Vincent Viafore drowned while kayaking on the Hudson with fiancée Angelika Graswald, police believed it was an accident. Then, after 11 hours of questioning Angelika, they charged her with second degree murder. Peter Van Sant reports.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Needs Enemies
programme.desc: A cold morning in December starts off like any other until a rural farmer discovers the body of a dead woman. What seems like a sadistic rape and murder turns into a conspiracy and before long the diabolical nature of someone close is revealed.

programme.title: Love Kills: Sheltered to Shackles
programme.desc: Victoria comes from a good family but can't help falling for Raymon, a bad boy from the streets. She quickly falls into a life of crime with him, breaking into homes and cars. When the couple ups the ante to armed robbery, their lives are changed forever.

programme.title: Love Kills: Us Against the World
programme.desc: Fate in the form of a framed picture brings Lori and Mike together. Mike's been in prison and wants to start over. When he meets Lori, he wants to take care of her. But when he can't get a job, he goes to the dark side again, taking Lori with him.

programme.title: Love Kills: It Was All a Big Fantasy
programme.desc: Josh is living his dream of running his family's farm with his girlfriend Donna by his side. But this perfect fantasy is shattered when Josh's mother takes the farm away from them. Revenge is served with a shotgun blast. But who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Deadly Divorce
programme.desc: An illicit affair between a bank executive and his secretary turns deadly when the soon-to-be ex-wife uncovers their romance.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Family
programme.desc: A high school romance must be kept a secret from a domineering father with traditional values. When the truth comes out, a heartbreaking choice between love and family brings devastating consequences.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: A young college student embarks on a secret affair with a police officer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hunger for Cash
programme.desc: When some women lust for money, it costs family and friends more than their bank balance. Putting money above lives, these 'Deadly Women' have a 'Hunger for Cash.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: A social worker can't keep the lid on her possessive nature, a friendship is destroyed by jealous delusions, and young love leads to a violent end.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Heartless
programme.desc: These women's actions were so cruel they were almost unbelievable. Their callous acts proved they were 'Heartless'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Love
programme.desc: When familiarity breeds contempt, love can turn to hate.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: The truths of the world's most clandestine institutions, top-secret locations and symbols.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: The truths of the world's most clandestine institutions, top-secret locations and symbols.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Codeman: Trigon
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat, ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Enchanted in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: Leslie and Kris love the crystal waters of Emerald Isle, North Carolina, and want to buy a beach property there that's big enough for their family of four. They find their perfect space, but it needs sprucing up before they can call it home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Three's Company on the Gulf Coast
programme.desc: A family searches for a beach retreat in Gulf Shores, AL. While they have different opinions on what type of house they should get, they all agree they want to live near the beach.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Full-on Fixer-Upper in St. Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Mountain Retreat with a Rocky View
programme.desc: The team contends with nearly impassable roads, mountain weather and a build site on top a granite boulder.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Retreat
programme.desc: Vicky and Rome are looking to trade in the hustle and bustle of life in New York for the sun and surf of Flagler Beach, Florida. They find an oceanfront property perfect for their new lifestyle, but it's in need of a major overhaul.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Buttered Up
programme.desc: Chefs and food experts are revealing the richest, creamiest buttery dishes out there. Alex Guarnaschelli brings on the butter with a one-of-a-kind shrimp-and-grits combo from Tillie's in Short Hills, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.desc: The Smurfs team up with human friends to save Smurfette, who has been kidnapped by Gargamel because she knows a secret spell.

programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hand-Me-Downer/ Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: The Northern Air Temple
programme.desc: The kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see if there are surviving Airbenders.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: The Waterbending Master
programme.desc: Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Day Without Tears/ Summer Job
programme.desc: Squidward bets SpongeBob he can't go a day without crying. Mrs. Puff has to work through her summer at the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Play's the Thing/ Rodeo Daze
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs opens a diner. SpongeBob takes his pals to Texas to see Sandy in a squirrel rodeo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid on Strike/ Sandy, SpongeBob and the Worm
programme.desc: SpongeBob is petrified by a huge worm and tells Sandy, who drags him into confronting it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton woo customers with greasy entrees. SpongeBob tries a career at being a model in a kitchen sponge commercial.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dying for Pie/ Imitation Krabs
programme.desc: Squidward lets Bob eat an exploding pie; Plankton disguises himself as Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing
programme.desc: Squidward is mistaken for a monster after a biking accident leaves him covered in mud and sticks. SpongeBob, thinking the monster is cute, decides to adopt him as a pet.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Porous Pockets/ Choir Boys
programme.desc: Patrick finds himself alone when SpongeBob becomes the richest citizen in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train. They must learn how to gain control of their superpowers, while keeping their identities a secret.

programme.title: Young Dylan
programme.desc: A family's world is turned upside down when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in with them unannounced.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Mighty Mom and Dyno Dad Meet Crimson Chin
programme.desc: When Timmy accidentally releases the crimson chin's arch-villain, all heck breaks loose.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Quietest Day Ever/ Bully Bromance Breakup
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create ninja outfits that make themselves invisible to anyone not wearing one.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Doonkleberry Imperative/ Buford Confidential
programme.desc: The boys go out in search of Doonkelberries so that Mom can make her famous pie.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Blackout!/ What'd I Miss?
programme.desc: Candace is put in charge of the boys right before the entire city loses electricity and they use the opportunity to make the most out of the blackout. Phineas and the gang try training domesticated squirrels to live in the wild.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: What a Croc!/ Ferb TV
programme.desc: When the boys learn that the famous Crikey the Crocodile has gone missing, they set out to find and return him to his home at the Danville Nature Preserve.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Mom Attractor/ Cranius Maximus
programme.desc: Candice asks the boys to invent a device that attracts their mom so that she can bust her brothers. In the meantime, Dr. Doofenshmirtz invents a 'Baby-Cry-Inator.' The boys invent a cerebral stimulatory hat to help Baljeet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sipping With the Enemy/ Tri-State Treasure: Boot of Secrets
programme.desc: Candace tries to bust Phineas and Ferb when they put on an enormous backyard magic show. Vanessa and Major Monogram's son, Monty, get coffee together.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Bed Bugs
Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Star Wars
programme.desc: The story is set a couple summers ago in a galaxy far, far away when Phineas, Ferb and the gang are in a parallel universe during Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope. Phineas and Ferb are living just one moisture farm over from Luke.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Interrupted/ A Real Boy
programme.desc: Candace spends the day with her mom in the backyard so that she can bust her brothers. Then, Dr. Doofenshmirtz thinks Vanessa overhears him say he would rather have a son, so he zaps her with the Forget-About-It Ray.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: My Fair Goalie
programme.desc: When Ferb's cousins visit from England and challenge him to a soccer match, he and Phineas warp the walls of physics and build a high tech 3D stadium. Candace enlists the help of Eliza to teach her the rules of etiquette.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ferb Latin/ Lotsa Latkes
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create their own language, Ferb Latin, which quickly catches on. Then, when all of the potatoes in Danville go missing, Phineas and Ferb decide to clone some using Buford's last potato chip, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: When Worlds Collide/ Road to Danville
programme.desc: Discovering that a strange planet is hurtling directly towards Danville, Phineas and Ferb set out to avert a disaster, while Buford looks forward to making contact with its alien race. Dr. Doofenshirmtz hopes to steal the world's largest ball of twine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year
programme.desc: NHL superstar Luc Robitaille offers his assistance when Phineas and Ferb take an ice hockey game to the extreme. Phineas and Ferb plan their own New Year's Eve ball drop, complete with a customized multi-dimensional ball, while Candice makes a resolution.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown Hosted by Kelly Osbourne
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram have their hearts set on revealing the top 10 musical numbers, but soon find out that Kelly Osbourne has been brought in to fill the role. Unwilling to play second, Doofenshmirtz plans to thwart Kelly.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Road Trip
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: La Candace-Cabra/ Happy Birthday, Isabella
programme.desc: The boys set out to prove the existence of the elusive Chupacabra to the world. Phineas and the gang celebrate Isabella’s birthday in a big way, but all she really wants is some quiet time with Phineas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thanks But No Thanks/ Troy Story
programme.desc: Inspired by Candace’s book club selection, the boys decide to reenact the Trojan War from “The Illiad,” but with a Phineas and Ferb twist.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's No Picnic/ Steampunx
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: E:60: The Mike Tyson Collection
programme.desc: Jeremy Schaap looks back at nearly four decades of Mike Tyson's career and interviews that reveal the man and the fighter.

programme.desc: The girls vie for the attention of a famous TV actor when he stars in a local play.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Before and After
programme.desc: Rose is convinced she died during a throat spasm. This leads her to live her life to the hilt, totally disrupting the other girls' lives. Then, when the girls complain about her new lifestyle, Rose moves out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One
programme.desc: Sophia readies herself for participating in a walkathon. Meanwhile, Dorothy, Blanche, and Rose babysit for the walkathon participants' children. But when the event is over, a baby is left unclaimed.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A struggling NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a national celebration.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Take Two
programme.desc: A woman moved to Los Angeles with dreams of becoming a writer. Years later, she's the producer of a reality show based around weddings. While filming on site, she runs into her ex-boyfriend, who is cast as the groom-to-be, and it sets her world on fire.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Design
programme.desc: A home-makeover star is sent to her hometown to renovate a historic manor. An old flame is assigned to ensure her work preserves the history of the building and the two are forced to work closely together.

programme.title: Movie: You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: An aspiring chef tries to win a food-truck competition, while her competitor tries to win her heart.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: South Park: Night of the Living Homeless
programme.desc: Ignoring the homeless in South Park becomes impossible when their numbers become overwhelming and their lust for spare change becomes insatiable. The boys devise a plan to rid the town of homeless once and for all.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: The Tooth Fairy's Tats 2000
programme.desc: When Cartman discovers the Tooth Fairy is paying a premium price for lost teeth, he and the boys seize the opportunity to make some cash.

programme.title: South Park: Up the Down Steroid
programme.desc: Cartman must convince a qualifying committee that he's handicapped in order to win the Special Olympics. Meanwhile, Jimmy is determined to win the Olympics at any cost.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: It's a Jersey Thing
programme.desc: Randy spearheads the town's defence when 'Jersey Shore'-inspired Garden State residents are threatening to take over the entire country.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: August 28, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums at School and Wrap it Up Box
programme.desc: Dave plays a crack addict who visits an elementary school to give an anti-drug speech.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla and Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure 'Blackzilla;' musical guest The Roots.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mad Real World and Ask a Gay Dude
programme.desc: Dave imagines the TV show The Real World with an all black cast and only one white guy.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer and Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave runs for office and shows how much cooler everything would be in slow motion.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms
programme.desc: Butters is selling vape pens and all kinds of fruity-flavored vape accessories at school. Randy decides he should move the family to the country and take up farming.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Member Berries
programme.desc: The national anthem gets a reboot by an American icon.

programme.title: South Park: Skank Hunt
programme.desc: Kyle's dad manages to keep his identity as a troll a secret while he takes his online abuse global.

programme.title: South Park: The Damned
programme.desc: Gerald is thrilled with the media attention as he continues to troll everyone and anyone.

programme.title: South Park: SHOTS!!!
programme.desc: Randy celebrates the success of Tegridy Farms while Cartman refuses to get a shot.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Hunting Trip
programme.desc: Leslie tries to prove she can hang with the guys, so she invites herself on Ron's annual hunting trip. Meanwhile, April and Andy bond in the office while everyone is away.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Tom's Divorce
programme.desc: Ron sends Leslie up to the DMV department and she happens to see Tom and Wendy at divorce court. Leslie enlists the help of everyone in the department to take Tom out on the town so he can forget his sadness. Tom has an epiphany about marriage.

programme.title: The Office: Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Just as his best friend Todd Packer visits the office, Michael fears that a new corporate crackdown on sexual harassment will dampen his reputation.

programme.title: The Office: Office Olympics
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight are out of the office for the day as Michael tries to close a deal on a new condo for himself. Meanwhile, Jim and Pam organize an "Office Olympics" where the staff members compete in ridiculous games.

programme.title: The Office: The Fire
programme.desc: A fire in the kitchen forces the employees of the Dunder Mifflin paper company to the parking lot. To ease everyone's boredom, Jim suggests a game where staff members reveal a little too much information about themselves.

programme.title: The Office: The Fight
programme.desc: After Dwight karate punches Michael, Jim organizes a lunchtime rematch at Dwight's dojo where Pam becomes annoyed when Jim gets too friendly with her.

programme.title: The Office: The Client
programme.desc: When Michael and Jan go after a new client, Michael surprises his boss in more ways than one. Meanwhile, Jim finds a screenplay written by Michael and the cubicle jockeys at Dunder Mifflin have a hilarious time acting it out.

programme.title: The Office: Performance Review
programme.desc: On performance review day, the employees meet with Michael to discuss their work performances. The only thing on Michael's mind is his own impending review from his boss later that day.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: Movie: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: After being abandoned at the Grand Canyon as a child, an adult Joe Dirt, who is now a white-trash janitor, begins a search for his birth parents. He meets many zany people along the way but realizes he belongs with the beautiful Brandy from Silvertown.

programme.title: Movie: Big Daddy
programme.desc: In an attempt to win back his girlfriend, Sonny becomes a foster parent to Julian, a child his friend Kevin never knew he had. As the most unlikely parent, Sonny begins to learn what responsibility as an adult truly is.

programme.title: Movie: Hitch
programme.desc: While helping his latest client, a professional 'date doctor' falls for a journalist.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: Unfiltered

programme.desc: After an eventful first year together, Brianna and Bill plan a big blowout in honor of Bri’s 22nd birthday. They soon come to find that some of their culture clash issues from their first year are still alive and well.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Rich Man, Poor Plan
programme.desc: After Bri's mom causes a big blowout with Bill's ex-wife, Bri is left scrambling to mend the rift between the two families. Young and in love, 23-year-old Erica prepares for a showdown between her dad and her much older boyfriend, Rick.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Daddy Issues
programme.desc: Far from the beaches of Miami, Rick arrives in Springfield to pitch Erica's father on his relationship with Erica. Kattie is hard up for rent and approaches Kevin for a loan, but he won't be anyone's bank.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: I Can't Get No Satisfaction
programme.desc: Still wanting to merge their worlds together, Bill organizes a dinner for Bri's mom, Sharon, and his ex-wife Kathleen to resolve tensions, but soon he becomes the target.

programme.title: Movie: Double Mommy
programme.desc: A teen discovers she is pregnant with twins but only one of the babies' is her boyfriend's. The other was fathered by a young man who raped her. When he finds out, he will stop at nothing to clear his name, including getting rid of her and the babies.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Stalker
programme.desc: Grace Winston has HPD (Histrionic Personality Disorder). After murdering her husband, she moves to Philadelphia and finds herself in love and obsessed with her neighbour and wants to make him fall for her. She invents an imaginary stalker.

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Secret Wife
programme.desc: A newly married woman finds out that her husband has another wife. Devastated, she decides the only decent thing to do is inform the other wife.

programme.title: Movie: Secrets in the Basement
programme.desc: A couple is overjoyed to leave their troubles in the city behind and begin a fresh start in their new home in the suburbs. But unbeknownst to them their beautiful new house is harboring a masked figure in the basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Letter Perfect
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep. There are no signs of trauma or injury, but toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill
programme.desc: Wichita residents live in fear that they will be a killer's next victim.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting
programme.desc: For years the BTK killer plays a cat and mouse game with law enforcement and the media taunting them as he seeks the attention he craves.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Mind of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo goes inside a maximum-security prison for an exclusive interview with one of America’s most notorious serial killers, Joel Rifkin. Cuomo asks him tough questions about his sordid sex life, why he murdered and how he was caught.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Revenge Killing
programme.desc: In 1987, a group of teens, hell-bent on revenge, killed local businessman John Hill who had raped their friend Jennifer. 30 years later, Chris Cuomo speaks to Lisa Harris, the only member of the group who was sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Killer Writing
programme.desc: John J. Lennon is a murderer that has built a literary career by writing about the prison system he lives in. Chris Cuomo talks with John J. Lennon about his crime, doing his time, and why he traded his gun for a pen.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Ice Mine Cometh
programme.desc: Winter has come along with the thinnest, most unpredictable ice in decades. After three years, Shawn returns to diving under the ice in pursuit of the Tomcod claim. Kris tries to set up and mine in one day. Emily's dependable Claim 14 shocks her.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Frozen Chokehold
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A regulator freeze-up cuts off Shawn's air supply just days into the winter mining season. Vernon returns to the ice aiming to buy Claim 16, while Emily negotiates with Mr. Gold for season-saving coordinates.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: Snow Blind
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: A violent arctic storm approaches as Shawn struggles to quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie, Emily's equipment fails and Vernon risks it all.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna, and Emily takes another desperate shot at TOMCOD gold.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Rogue Rage
programme.desc: The newly-formed group desperately hunts for moose. When Oliver refuses to go along with the plan and is an obstacle in the line of fire, Andrew pushes back. Army veteran Adam arrives at base camp and immediately tackles critical building projects.

programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Josh James
programme.desc: Ed takes on Josh James, the 'Kiwi bushman', in the Three Parallel Rivers plateau of Yunnan Province. Josh draws on his Maori-heritage to make fire in the mountains.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice
programme.desc: Following the arctic storm that drove everyone to shore, Shawn embarks on a marathon dive, Kris unveils a diving relay with The Reaper's new diver Shaunna, and Emily takes another desperate shot at TOMCOD gold.
