programme.title: Ed Stafford: First Man Out: Ed vs Josh James
programme.desc: Ed takes on Josh James, the 'Kiwi bushman', in the Three Parallel Rivers plateau of Yunnan Province. Josh draws on his Maori-heritage to make fire in the mountains.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: Sins of the City
programme.desc: 12,000 years ago, a change in human behaviour determined the nature of modern civilization.

programme.title: Out of Egypt: The Birth of the Devil
programme.desc: Somewhere in the course of human history, a force of pure evil began to emerge, and the devil was born.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A funny car catches on fire, crashes and disintegrates. A fire causes a university in Holland to collapse. A four-story wall of water crashes a windsurfer. During a church fire, a firefighter is nearly crushed.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: Blue Horizon
programme.desc: Bonefish and permit are the marquee species in Alphonse Island in the Seychelles.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Four Group B Day 1
programme.desc: Join 48 of the world's best professional anglers as they compete in fishing tournaments.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Armed with a degree in archaeology and a passion for travel, Josh Gates investigates unsolved iconic stories across the globe. Immersing himself in different cultures to understand the world as they do, Josh hunts out the truth behind the legend.

programme.title: Expeditions to the Edge: Beginning of the End?
programme.desc: The crew of the Infinity is in the Marshall Islands preparing for one of the most dangerous expeditions known to man: sailing farther north than any sail ship ever has. If they don't leave in time, they risk being locked in arctic ice for ten months.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Like Father Like Daughter
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy conspire to get Jake to do their prospecting, but the former deckhand seizes the moment to fill his own tanks. The Wizard crew must break through ice to rush Keith to a doctor. Junior fears the worst as a deckhand falls from the stack.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut
programme.desc: A rare weather event churns up rogue waves as supermoon tides collide with a cyclonic snowstorm. Josh and Casey face a 55-foot monster, while Jake risks capsizing to repair his rudder in unruly seas. Monte's big move north pays off in massive pots.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: The Dope of Oregon
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Jim Belushi is adding another expertise to his repertoire: cannabis farmer! Jim learns the hard way that the 'I'll do it myself' mentality leads to mistakes. Later, Jim discovers that his family's support for his new endeavor is waning.

programme.title: Growing Belushi: A Mission from God
programme.desc: Jim and Chris are on their way to Idaho for a Blues Brothers show with Dan Aykroyd, where Jim plans to ask Dan for the right to use the Blues Brothers' brand. Dan sets Jim on a 'Mission from God' to Colombia, in pursuit of elusive cannabis strains.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Everything Is About to Change
programme.desc: Twins Darcey and Stacey are at different points in their lives. While Darcey is healing after another failed relationship, Stacey is preparing for the arrival of her Albanian fiancé, Florian, who is coming to America on a K-1 visa.

programme.title: Darcey & Stacey: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Stacey's Albanian fiancé, Florian, arrives in America, and the couple's 90 days begin. Darcey reveals a sexy new love interest. Stacey comes clean about meeting up with Darcey's ex, Tom.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: Armando's first attempt at PDA ends badly. Ari questions living in Ethiopia after her mom leaves. Deavan attempts to improve her relationship with Jihoon's mom. Tim has a troubling job interview. Brittany and Yazan clash over her social media.

programme.desc: Angela refuses to submit to Michael's family, Colt reveals he's been lying to Jess and Elizabeth's family finds out what Andrei has been hiding. Asuelu's family pushes Kalani over the edge and Larissa requests money for a dramatic change.

programme.title: Top Ten Weather Destinations

programme.title: Top Ten Amazing Moments
programme.desc: For more than thirty years, our meteorologists have battled the wildest weather on the planet. They've taken you along for the ride and in the heart of the storm, their reports have kept you informed. We look at ten amazing moments in weather reporting.

programme.title: Top Ten Heroes and Survivors
programme.desc: Getting caught in extreme weather can lead to dire and dangerous circumstances. For those who find themselves trapped by ferocious conditions, the spirit to survive or an offer of a heroic helping hand is often the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Filling Up on Philly
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is filling up on a taste of Philadelphia. There's a funky malt house serving Buffalo wings and a Polish twist on the cheesesteak. Plus, a long time tavern making real deal Italian recipes and a stop for Indonesian specialities.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Style
programme.desc: Two Providence brothers create new family classics including BBQ chicken-stuffed ravioli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh, Filled and Fried
programme.desc: Guy crosses the country looking for scratch cooking done right, including fried empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home
programme.desc: On today's menu, there's gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville, primo pizza from Boulder, Colorado, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Quirky Classics
programme.desc: Guy enjoys some one-of-a-kind meals like cajun oysters Rockefeller and burgers slathered with a remoulade called goo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Sammies
programme.desc: A food truck shuckin' and frying oysters for a po boy in Vancouver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Road Show
programme.desc: Guy is tucking in the napkin and getting into some righteous barbecue. In Dallas, the barbecue stand tucked into a farmers' market is dishing out classic beef brisket and Carolina pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bringing Comfort Home
programme.desc: On today's menu, there's gourmet grilled cheese from Nashville, primo pizza from Boulder, Colorado, Memphis fried chicken and Greek kebabs out of Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef and Bratwurst
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' the road and diggin' into some serious meat. In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot putting out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken. In Vancouver, an elevated diner dishing out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Family, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads to places where families rule, including a Hawaiian Thai spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cookin' It Old School
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers three joints putting' a piece of history on the table: In New Orleans, an oyster bar where nothing's changed since 1919 and the deep fried oysters are still hand-shucked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Dishes
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls in for classic meals done right: In Baltimore, a shack steamin' crabs with corn on the cob; In Memphis, the little place with classic southern favorites; And in Minnesota, a strip mall joint doin' home-made Italian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Doin' Their Own Thing
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers joints doing things their own unique way, a retro joint making shark tacos. In Chicago, a dinner prepares seafood sixteen different ways, and a chef from Montreal does a Canadian take of Jewish deli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Favorites
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Santa Fe and Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tries out local favourites in New Orleans, Pittsburgh and Albuquerque.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Trendy Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Rachael uses a Korean-inspired batter and slaw to shake up the traditional fried chicken game. Vodka and corn-starch in the batter are the secret to light and crispy skin on Korean fried chicken and her kimchi slaw puts a spin on cabbage slaw.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Fair Food Fare for the Kids
programme.desc: Valerie Bertarelli’s brother-in-law is bringing his family for a visit this summer, but his sons are sad about missing the Virginia State Fair back home. Aunt Valerie comes to the rescue, bringing all the great and unique tastes of the state fair home.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Last Call for Summer
programme.desc: The cast savour one last bite of the flavours of the summer, starting with Katie Lee's French onion burger and Jeff Mauro's whole BBQ'd cauliflower. Food writer Alison Roman bakes pistachio-plum crisp, and Katie throws an ice cream party.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Go Nuts for Doughnuts!
programme.desc: A trip to Five Daughters Bakery in Nashville inspires Trisha Yearwood to make a doughnut-based menu, including Green Onion Cheddar Doughnuts, Doughnut Grilled Cheese, Tortellini Soup and an Iced Cafe Bombon.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl Meets Grill
programme.desc: Molly Yeh fires up the outdoor grill to make her favorite tailgating recipes with a twist, starting with Spicy Cheddar Juicy Lucies with Homemade Chili Potato Chips and Sesame Avocado Salsa on the side.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 13
programme.desc: Ree cooks up ranch-style Italian with the help of her kid crew. First up is a family favourite: chicken Florentine mac and cheese. Then, a squash replaces spaghetti in a healthy spin on classic Bolognese and a cast iron pizza Bianca in a skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: One-Pot Wonders
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cuts down on the cleanup with four one-pot recipes. The non-stick skillet is perfect for breakfast hash with fried eggs and a multi-pasta pot is all you need for loaded veggie pasta.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Beat the Heat
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares fun, cool recipes for the hottest days of summer. The refreshing dishes include Easy Roasted Green Gazpacho, Strawberry Balsamic BLT and Grilled Swordfish with Mango Salsa. Plus, Watermelon Granita Parfait is the perfect summer dessert.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Rose All Day With Geoffrey Zakarian
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites Geoffrey Zakarian over for a proper Southern throwdown filled with tasty apps and his signature magnum of Rose. Her menu includes pork ribs with sun-dried tomato glaze.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Barbecues and Bouquets
programme.desc: It's a day of flames and flowers as Ina shares fantastic surf and turf grilling recipes with her friend, perfumer Antonia. She's welcoming her with Gazpacho With goat's cheese croutons for lunch.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games, Part 1
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites eight GGG winners to return to Flavortown Market for a summer grilling tournament. Each week, one chef will be awarded 'Best Dish, win $5,000 and move on to the next week's competition while the remaining chefs duke it out for survival.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Summer Grillin' Games, Part 2

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Mummy on the Ghost Ship
programme.desc: When a mummy is discovered on an abandoned boat, investigators struggle to explain where it came from. Jeremy Wade reveals what happened and the strange forces to blame for this mysterious phenomenon on the high seas.

programme.title: River Monsters: Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates terrifying reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys, a beast so violent that it slices through flesh and even breaks bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy travels to the Bahamas after hearing tales of swimmers being ripped from the surface of blue holes surrounding the island; locals attribute the tragic disappearances to the legendary Lusca monster.

programme.title: The Zoo: Andre the Baby Goat
programme.desc: A markhor goat gives birth to Andre, the biggest baby of the year. A baby bat requires human care before it can be reintroduced to its colony. Later, confiscated lizards destined for the pet trade require urgent medical attention.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Gaur Move
programme.desc: Keepers introduce three gaur, a large, skittish species of cattle, to the rest of the herd. A sickly Sambar fawn is rushed to the health center. Plus, the bird department excitedly prepares for the arrival of great hornbills.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Maggie the Magnificent
programme.desc: Technology from California is brought to the aquarium to monitor beluga whale activity. Maggie the Asian small-clawed otter's training kicks in when receiving a shot, and Morty the sea star undergoes a checkup after suspicious growths form.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Soul Survivor
programme.desc: A former adopter comes back to Villalobos to find a companion to support her through her battle with cancer. The VRC crew join efforts to rescue an injured stray near the warehouse. And Tia puts a new parolee through his paces.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves
programme.desc: Villalobos is tested like never before when Tia and her crew are called upon to rescue a pack of wolf-dog hybrids abandoned by a backyard breeder. With law enforcement threatening to kill the dogs, the pressure is higher than ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Origin Story
programme.desc: Waah survives poverty, violence and hustling on the streets of New York and sets his sites on making it in the music business.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: The Rise of Ruff Ryders
programme.desc: The Deans build Ruff Ryders at Powerhouse Studios in Yonkers. DMX signs with Def Jam and makes history releasing two multi-platinum albums in one year. DMX and Ruff Ryders revolutionize hip-hop with the sound of the street.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Money, Power, Respect
programme.desc: With an Interscope distribution deal, the Deans expand Ruff Ryders, signing Eve, Drag-on and The Lox. Waah launches a lifestyle brand and national motorcycle chapters. As Ruff Ryders soar, fame takes a steep toll on DMX.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Ryde of Die
programme.desc: Ruff Ryders and Cash Money join forces for an historic tour. The tour sells out, but a key sponsor bails, leaving the Deans to bankroll the venture. Then, at the peak of Ruff Ryders' success, Dee nearly dies in a high-speed crash.

programme.title: No Limit Chronicles: Ruff Ryders Forever
programme.desc: Ruff Ryders reels after Dee's crash. Waah manages talent exodus, contraction of music biz, and expands lifestyle brand. He reboots the label, focuses on the next generation of rappers, bikers and giving back to the community.

programme.title: Martin: Martin Returns
programme.desc: After learning more about the cult leader, Martin escapes and returns to Detroit. Once he arrives, he finds that Gina took the liberty of redecorating his apartment.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got Work to Do
programme.desc: Martin, desperately seeking a new job, lowers his standards and begins taking a stream of low-paying, part-time jobs.

programme.title: Martin: The Closer I Get to You

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Save the Last Trance for Me

programme.title: The Parkers: Road Trip

programme.title: The Parkers: Sign of the Shaq

programme.desc: C.J. and Janine have a party and don't invite Curtis and Ella. Malik and Summer argue over an obscure anniversary.

programme.title: House of Payne: Right Turn
programme.desc: Curtis does community service at the Help Center. Miranda doesn't invite Janine to a concert.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: To Thine Own Self Be Blue … and Gold

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cold Feet, Hot Body
programme.desc: Will wrestles with temptation when an attractive new student tries to lure him from Lisa.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love in an Elevator
programme.desc: While stuck in an elevator, Carlton and Jazz argue over who will be Will's best man.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: For Whom the Wedding Bells Toll
programme.desc: When Will is consumed by pre-wedding jitters and doubts, he goes to Lisa for help.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Burnin' Down the House
programme.desc: Will accidentally sets fire to the kitchen just before Phil's boss comes to dinner.

programme.title: Martin: Movin' on In
programme.desc: Martin and Gina move back in together, but there are too many belongings to fit.

programme.title: Martin: Momma's Baby, Martin's Maybe
programme.desc: When Gina's mother comes to visit, Martin is excited at his opportunity to impress her.

programme.title: Martin: Whole Lotto Trouble
programme.desc: When Martin wins the lottery, he spends a lot of the money before claiming his prize.

programme.title: Martin: Get a Job
programme.desc: Martin and Gina go undercover to try and discover what Tommy does for a living.

programme.title: Martin: Feast or Famine
programme.desc: The gang decides to hold a contest to see which gender is the better cook at Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Martin: Lockin' Boots
programme.desc: Martin finds out about a withdrawal Gina made from their bank account to pay a ticket.

programme.title: Martin: Go Tell It on the Martin
programme.desc: A distraught man with a bomb strapped to him takes over the station during Martin's show.

programme.title: Martin: 'Xpress Yourself

programme.desc: After one of the men who killed his wife and daughter is set free, Clyde Shelton takes justice into his own hands and begins taking out everyone that was connected to the case.

programme.desc: Two sisters join the first female professional baseball league during the Second World War and struggle to help it succeed despite their growing sibling rivalry.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Denise and Desist
programme.desc: Denise is a no-show at Dorit’s housewarming party and fails to keep plans with Garcelle twice in one week. The group jets off to celebrate Erika's Broadway debut, while Lisa and Denise try to salvage their 20-year friendship in a tense one on one.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Thriller, Filler and Spiller
programme.desc: A suburban couple decides to spend big to give their family a dream backyard, but the project gets off to a rocky start. The plan for a massive new patio runs into underground complications and designing with kids in mind proves to be a struggle.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Brides and Blooms
programme.desc: The Manscapers travel upstate to a working farm and vacation retreat owned by their friend Matt, to help him prepare for a wedding, but the farm has never hosted a wedding before, and a hurricane forced the couple to call off their ceremony once before.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Business Is Blooming
programme.desc: The team is back and have expanded their clientele with more projects they can handle. The trio must win over a demanding client and his pregnant wife with a major wow factor. Meanwhile, James and Garrett worry Mel is avoiding her health issues.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Blurring the Lines
programme.desc: The Manscapers take on their next clients in Brooklyn, who also happen to be Mel's friends. James and Mel butt heads over his concerns that they will lose money instead of being able to grow their business. Garrett struggles with his work life balance.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: Growing to New Heights
programme.desc: The Manscapers are tasked with creating a Tuscan-themed backyard in the middle of New Jersey.

programme.title: Backyard Envy: More Money Moss Problems
programme.desc: The Manscapers work with a couple who were fired by their previous landscapers. Then, they learn to juggle their burgeoning business as they booked the biggest job of their careers: A One-Million Dollar job with St. Germain Liqueur.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Altman Versus Fredrik
programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts. Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer who has high expectations and a rocky past with Altman. James and David are up against the clock to find their nine months pregnant client her dream home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Ze Plane, Ze Plane!
programme.desc: Altman struggles to convince an unrealistic seller but risks losing the potential listing. Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones in Pasadena. Flagg goes all out with a plane for his new resort-style trophy listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Flagg it or Bag it
programme.desc: James and David host a backyard BBQ in Santa Monica, Altman goes after a new modern in Bird Streets, but is shocked when the sellers consider a low-ball offer. Flagg tries to find "Glee" star Becca Tobin her dream home in the historic Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: 24 Hours or Else
programme.desc: Altman races against the clock after being thrown a curveball by his Bird Streets sellers. James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem as the sellers have their own ideas about price, and who the buyers should be.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Swedish Invasion

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Medieval Time Machine

programme.desc: In Hamburg, NY, employees at the local Toys 'R' Us are faced with the unthinkable when one of their own is savagely killed during an otherwise typical nightshift. Suddenly, every co-worker is a suspect, but is one masking as a murderer?

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: An evening at a Mississippi casino turns into a nightmare when a beautiful wife and mother is abducted. When investigators uncover some startling truths the suspects are countless. But it's a shocking twist that finally leads to an unexpected arrest.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Lynn Hajny & Tommy Douyette
programme.desc: Features couples whose passion drives them to commit terrible criminal acts.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jennifer Shanbrom and Matt Fletcher
programme.desc: A beloved police officer's murder will take years for his brothers in blue to solve, ultimately revealing a conspiracy born out of lust and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jordan Hodge and Kenny Carlisle
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother and her new husband go missing, triggering an investigation that reveals a twisted tale of first love and a motive fueled by obsession and greed.

programme.title: Cold Justice: No Safe Return
programme.desc: Kelly and Aaron Sam look into the disappearance of a father who tragically vanished just before he could move back home to his family. A surprising twist comes from a forensic lab.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Fatal Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey return to Fort Myers, Florida to investigate the 1997 murder of an aspiring police officer robbed and fatally shot in his motel room. The suspects include four local men and a female witness that may have set him up.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Double Life Discovered
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny investigate one of their oldest cases ever, the brutal 1984 murder of an elderly storeowner known for having a wife with a violent temper. Was his death the robbery gone wrong it appeared to be, or a plot of his wife's design?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Golden Years Gone
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey head to Colorado to help the Prowers County Sheriff's Office investigate the 1991 homicide of a beloved elderly couple who were brutally killed while working at their local VFW Hall.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: In the Name of the Grandfather
programme.desc: The Simpson family travels to Ireland so Grandpa can have one last pint at his beloved O'Flanagan's Pub in Dunkilderry. After a few spirits, Homer and Grandpa buy the establishment from the owner and try to bring it back to life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Wedding for Disaster
programme.desc: When their marriage turns out to be invalid, Homer asks Marge for a re-do on their 'I do's'. But when Homer mysteriously disappears just before the wedding, Bart and Lisa go searching for answers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Eeny Teeny Maya Moe
programme.desc: In an effort to spend more time with Maggie, Homer takes her to Moe's. While at the bar, Moe tells Homer about his new love, Maya, a woman he met on the Internet. But after meeting her in person, Moe has trouble with the fact that she is short.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father Knows Worst
programme.desc: When Homer observes Bart and Lisa struggling in certain aspects of their academic and social lives at school, he becomes a proponent of 'helicopter parenting,' the process of closely monitoring a child and forcing them to succeed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waverly Hills, 9021-D'Oh
programme.desc: When Marge learns Springfield Elementary is the worst school in the state, she and Homer rent an apartment in an upscale neighbourhood so Bart and Lisa can attend a better school. To boost Lisa's popularity, Bart tells everyone she's friends with a star.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa visit the nail salon where they engage in a spirited debate as to whether a woman can be smart, powerful and beautiful all at the same time. To prove their point, they spin four tales of famous women starring familiar Springfield faces.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Wife Hope
programme.desc: The men and boys of Springfield become obsessed with Mixed Martial Arts, a sport where fighters inflict severe pain on one another. When Marge and her friends stage a protest, the show's promoter embraces the controversy and challenges Marge to a match.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: O Brother, Where Bart Thou
programme.desc: One snowy day in Springfield, Lisa informs Bart that she and Maggie share a bond that Bart will never understand because he doesn't have a brother, so Bart asks Homer for a baby brother. When Homer turns him down, Bart heads to the orphanage.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Live and Let Fly
programme.desc: The kids learn the dangers of revenge when their plan to get back at the school guidance counselor gets them entangled in a deep rooted sibling rivalry between two pilots.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Fresh Princ-ipal
programme.desc: Things get out of hand when Louise wins a contest to be Principal for a Day. Back at the restaurant, Teddy has a unique suggestion to help Bob when he suddenly finds himself unable to flip burgers.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Throw It Away
programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Archer: White Nights
programme.desc: Archer's search for his father's identity leads him behind the Iron Curtain and into hot water.

programme.title: Archer: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Krieger nears completion of a top-secret project at ISIS, and Archer brings a beautiful former KGB agent home to meet Malory.

programme.title: Mom: Diabetic Lesbians and a Blushing Bride
programme.desc: When Marjorie announces she's getting married, Christy and Bonnie are determined to make it the perfect day.

programme.title: Mom: Sticky Hands and a Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Christy, Jill and Wendy find themselves in a sticky situation when they agree to help Bonnie smuggle an illegal substance across the Canadian border.

programme.title: Mom: Death, Death, Death and a Bucket of Chicken
programme.desc: Christy tries to be supportive when a health scare throws Bonnie into a tailspin.

programme.title: Mom: Nazi Zombies and a Two-Hundred Pound Baby
programme.desc: Bonnie tries to get Christy to admit she still has feelings for her ex-husband, Baxter.

programme.title: Mom: Cornflakes and the Hair of Three Men
programme.desc: When the restaurant closes for renovations, Christy takes a job as Jill's personal assistant. Also, Bonnie answers a wrong number and falls for the guy on the other end of the line.

programme.title: Movie: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a successful billionaire that spends a lot of time away from his family. When he tries to buy a cat for his daughter, the owner of the store traps him inside the cat's body. He has one week to reconnect with his family or he won't get free.

programme.title: Movie: A Dog's Purpose
programme.desc: A dog looks to discover his purpose through several owners and lifetimes. He spends each of his lives showing humans how to laugh and love, until in one of his lifetimes he ends up back with his original owner. He does his best to make his owner remember.

programme.title: Movie: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: With a villainous octopus bent on taking over the world, four espionage penguins join up with an elite task force dedicated to helping animals who can't help themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Point Break
programme.desc: A young FBI agent infiltrates a team of extraordinary extreme sports athletes he believes is masterminding sophisticated corporate heists.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Sean Boswell travels to Tokyo to live with his father in the hopes of avoiding a jail sentence. In an impoverished section of the city, he gets drawn into the world of drift racing.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Movie: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: After Letty is killed, Dom returns to America in search of her killer. Brian is an FBI agent who is on the same trail as Dom, which leads to a drug ring and Letty's killer. Infiltrating the driver ranks, Dom and Brian try to get to the bottom things.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: A Celebration Prequel
programme.desc: Get a sneak peek at musical compositions and arrangements that will bring together eight of the most extraordinary sequences from past BBC natural history landmarks.

programme.title: Movie: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Sean Boswell travels to Tokyo to live with his father in the hopes of avoiding a jail sentence. In an impoverished section of the city, he gets drawn into the world of drift racing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Emergence
programme.desc: The crew is endangered when the ship suddenly develops its own intelligence.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: The Preemptive Strike
programme.desc: Ro Lauren is forced to choose between her loyalty to Picard and her hatred of Cardassia.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Galapagos
programme.desc: Travel to the most famous archipelago on Earth, the Galapagos. The islands are home bizarre and unique creatures.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands: New England
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible colour change on Earth, when the greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn. See how this vibrant fiesta is created by the battles between the trees and the forests' inhabitations.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Port Protection: Looking for Blood
programme.desc: Gary makes a supply run to Wrangell, Alaska, and is asked by Hans and Timbi to bring back some very precious cargo that the whole community is counting on.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Monsters of the Nile
programme.desc: Dr. Zeb Hogan travels to Lake Victoria and the Nile River in Uganda and comes face to face with one of the continent's largest species of freshwater fish, the Nile Perch, and investigates how this legendary 6 foot, 300 pound predator - is faring.

programme.title: Monster Fish: American Behemoth
programme.desc: Zeb travels to the midwestern United States in search of the paddlefish, one of the largest and oldest freshwater fish species on the planet. They once teemed throughout the Mississippi and the Missouri River, but their populations have plummeted.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Australian River King
programme.desc: The Murray Cod is Australia's largest true freshwater fish and a deadly predator. Growing up to six feet long and weighing 250 pounds, this powerful hunter will strike to catch prey out of the water.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Catfish King
programme.desc: Zeb Hogan travels to Spain in search of the invasive Wels catfish -- a monster fish capable of growing more than 8 feet long, eating birds, cats, and, as some legends claim -- even humans!

programme.title: Monster Fish: Giant Goonch
programme.desc: Zeb Hogan hooks super-sized catfish in the last great, undammed river of Asia.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Frankenfish
programme.desc: Zeb Hogan, an explorer and aquatic biologist, goes in search of monster snakehead in Thailand, their natural habitat, and Florida, where they have become aggressive invaders.

programme.title: Monster Fish: Amazon Shocker
programme.desc: Dr. Zeb Hogan travels to the Brazilian Amazon to determine whether the shock of an electric eel is proportionate to the fish's size.

programme.title: Monster Fish: River Shark!
programme.desc: To separate fact from fiction, Zeb Hogan is teaming up with some of Florida's leading shark experts on a quest to catch a river shark and to determine the truth behind their deadly reputation.

programme.title: Peru's Hidden Rainforest

programme.title: Florida Untamed: Gator Country
programme.desc: Following three juvenile gators on a fight for survival as they work to outmanoeuvre their abundant foe in a distressing game of life or death.

programme.desc: Travelling to the extreme landscapes of the Canadian Arctic, we witness the wonders of life far north.

programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Weird barren rings in the Namib Desert, an island the size of Manhattan that vanishes without trace and a lost city in the heart of the Amazonian jungle. What on Earth? Investigates six more mysteries captured from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Secret of Doomsday Mountain
programme.desc: Satellites discover American stealth technology deep inside China. An unidentified cloud swamps America's skis. Finally, something truly massive is lurking beneath Loch Ness.

programme.title: What on Earth?: World's Deadliest Threats
programme.desc: The world's most dangerous threats are in top-secret locations all over the planet, and using cutting-edge technology, experts reveal the truth behind these sinister mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hidden Tomb of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is found in the heartlands of Mongolia. Find out if it is the lost tomb of Genghis Khan. Bizarre rings in Spain could lead to the lost city of Atlantis and a huge floating island is on a collision course with New Zealand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Evidence
programme.desc: The discovery of extraterrestrial life might face an impossible challenge: the physics of the universe itself. Using cutting-edge technology, experts might be on the verge of a groundbreaking find and the evidence could already be in hand.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secrets of Time Travel
programme.desc: Time travel might be more possible than we ever imagined, and today, cutting-edge technology and the latest research into black holes and wormholes is helping experts get steps closer to discovering how to travel through time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Did the Big Bang Really Happen?
programme.desc: New discoveries are causing astronomers to question if the Big Bang really happened, and using the latest science, they investigate if it wasn't just the start of our universe but many mysterious multiverses.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are unthinkable.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Jilted and Jealous
programme.desc: Jealousy can become an obsessive trait and a deadly trait.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Ditched and Desperate
programme.desc: Breaking up is never easy but it can be murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Scott Peterson: An American Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 27-year-old expectant mother Laci Peterson vanishes on Christmas Eve, suspicion falls on her husband, Scott. Take a deep, intimate look into the gripping investigation and explosive trial that became a national spectacle.

programme.title: Scott Peterson: An American Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 27-year-old expectant mother Laci Peterson vanishes on Christmas Eve, suspicion falls on her husband, Scott. Take a deep, intimate look into the gripping investigation and explosive trial that became a national spectacle.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gentle Giant
programme.desc: On August 25, 2015, 51-year-old care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his San Antonio, Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Boy in Blue
programme.desc: On April 28th, 2010, 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, a block from an earlier shooting. As police question if the two are related, only CCTV can help piece together the puzzle and ID Alajawan's killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead on Reflection
programme.desc: On April 4th, 2014, Kimberly Robertson's battered body is found on a sidewalk after a date with her boyfriend. A network of surveillance cameras plays out Kimberly's last few hours alive. Can CCTV footage help catch her killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Angel of Death
programme.desc: When a jilted lover storms into a provincial police station making wild accusations against her ex, one detective questions the credibility and motives of the wronged woman. But he has no idea just how sinister her secrets are.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: Shattered: A Very Bad Day
programme.desc: One morning in 1994, a high school student holds his class hostage at gunpoint. As students, teachers and police are faced with impending disaster, they have no idea that the worst of the day's carnage is yet to be discovered.

programme.title: Shattered: Mother's Little Helpers
programme.desc: 2001. A son's visit home turns into a desperate search for his missing father. A detective uncovers a murder with a stunning revelation about a group of children, and a mother struggles to believe her son could be involved in a vicious crime.

programme.title: Shattered: The Green Light
programme.desc: In 1991, a single mother takes her daughter to a busy electronics store to buy a boom box. Nearly nine hours later, she walks out as a battered survivor of one of the largest hostage crises in U.S. history.

programme.title: Shattered: Angel of Death
programme.desc: In 1996, Larry Schlegel visits his elderly mother at the hospital one last time before she succumbs to pneumonia. Then, years later, police give him the shock of his life, when they inform him that her death was not at all what it seemed.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to be the Black Market Maestro
programme.desc: A 19-year-old's escalating crimes get him arrested. After a jury acquits him for attempted murder, he reverts back to his old ways by robbing wealthy homeowners. The crime-spree launches a countywide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Hide Out in Suburbia
programme.desc: Robert Jeffery lost his entire drug business in a fire and robbed a bank to pay off his supplier.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Bridge to Freedom
programme.desc: Nicholas Johnson was a teen robber who terrorized the streets of Portland, Oregon, but after getting caught, he planed an elaborate escape.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot in the Leg
programme.desc: When a friend is fired from a restaurant, Konh Chung Bounnam and his friends decide to rob it. The plan goes awry and three people are killed. His friends are caught but Bounnam stays free. He hides until his need for money gets the FBI's attention.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Bridge to Freedom
programme.desc: Nicholas Johnson was a teen robber who terrorized the streets of Portland, Oregon, but after getting caught, he planed an elaborate escape.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia
programme.desc: As the head of Murder, Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. He was unpredictable, a psychopath who would eventually outlive his usefulness.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Al Capone
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St. Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by U.S. government, Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Food Trucks

programme.title: The Ivory Tower

programme.title: Rick Steves' Tasty Europe

programme.title: Lawrence Welk: God Bless America
programme.desc: A musical tribute to America's freedoms, its leaders and its veterans, and to the patriotism Lawrence Welk held dear as part of the classic American success story of his life. Marking the 100th birthday of Lawrence Welk, who died in May 1992.

programme.title: Fleetwood Mac: The Dance - An 'In the Spotlight' Special

programme.title: ABBA Forever: A Celebration

programme.title: A Chef's Life: One Potato, New Potato

programme.title: In Their Own Words: Queen Elizabeth II

programme.title: In Their Own Words: Muhammad Ali

programme.desc: Ulysses S. Grants rises from his humble beginnings to become the winning General of one of the Civil War's bloodiest battles.

programme.title: Grant: Lincoln's General
programme.desc: Ulysses S. Grant takes incredible risks, becomes Abraham Lincoln's favorite General and prepares for an epic clash with Robert E. Lee.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Clayton English
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: James Davis
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chris Redd Headlines
programme.desc: Funny man Chris Redd headlines as the always hilarious Donnell Rawlings jokes about his time in the military. Plus, Chanel Ali sets off new hair trends in the workplace.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Janelle James Headlines
programme.desc: The always funny Janelle James headlines tonight. Plus, Blaq Ron gives a brief history lesson on line dancing, Kerry Coddett contemplates alternate styles of dating and Reggie Conquest has a PSA for kids.

programme.title: The Misery Index: No One Told Sal
programme.desc: Find out what happens when your parachute doesn't open, when your new parent is a sex doll, and what makes Jameela hide behind her podium.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Trust Me as Someone Who Has One!
programme.desc: Horse the squirrel meets a cataclysmic end. The Tenderloins renew their long standing cat vs dog fight, and one contestant makes waves by revealing who is 'statistically the best.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: Movie: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Dr. Evil teams up with a unique villain named Goldmember to take over the world by going back in time to kidnap Austin Powers' father.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Payday
programme.desc: As Eddie prepares to become a dad, the rest of the crew's wagering is out of control, forcing Terry to ban gambling. The crew finds creative ways to bet behind Chief's back, causing Lucy to fall into a hole of debt she can't climb out from.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire in Sex Town
programme.desc: When a perverted arsonist strikes Tacoma, the TPD and the TFD must put aside their rivalries to solve the case. To everyone's surprise, the two crews discover they are not as different as they think. Unfortunately, the lovefest may not last.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Councilwoman Price tells Terry to find the author of an anonymous firefighter blog from the station and shut it down. With everyone a suspect, no one can be trusted.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Chief McConky to transfer Delilah Dunn to the station, which causes the men in the team to seek a macho match to their energy. Meanwhile, Eddie takes Councilwoman Price for a walk on the wild side.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Fire Choir
programme.desc: Wolf Boykins returns to lead the 'Ex-SING-guishers', the station's choir group. Eddie teases Granny for joining the group but soon finds himself vying for a spot.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The Crying Game
programme.desc: Eddie heads a peer counseling session that leads the crew to learn more about themselves.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Ike and Mike
programme.desc: Ike's twin brother pays a visit to ask a favor. Meanwhile, the crew takes DNA tests and get some shocking results.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part One)
programme.desc: Terry learns some new dance moves to impress Vicky at the fireman's ball, while Lucy discovers that her date is more like his mother than she realized. Plus, Eddie finds out he is up for a big promotion.
